allow: PowerShell($ports = 3000,3001,3002,3003; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { foreach \($c in $conns\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("Porta {0} -> PID {1} \({2}\)" -f $p, $c.OwningProcess, $proc.ProcessName\) } } else { Write-Output \("Porta {0} -> livre" -f $p\) } })

PowerShell($pids = 10456,4884,1392,14632; foreach \($id in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("PID {0} encerrado" -f $id\) } catch { Write-Output \("PID {0} -> {1}" -f $id, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($ports = 3000,3001,3002,3003; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { Write-Output \("Porta {0} -> AINDA OCUPADA \(PID {1}\)" -f $p, $conns.OwningProcess\) } else { Write-Output \("Porta {0} -> livre" -f $p\) } })
